            document.querySelectorAll('.vue-instance:not(.vue-instance--active)').forEach(function (el) {
                activateSingleVueInstance(el, {}, 'vue-instance--active');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.vue-instance-carousel:not(.vue-instance--active)').forEach(function (el) {
                var additionalConf = {
                    components: {
                        'Carousel': VueCarousel.Carousel,
                        'Slide': VueCarousel.Slide
                    },
                    methods: {
                        nextSlide() {
                            this.$refs.carousel.goToPage(this.$refs.carousel.getNextPage());
                        },
                        prevSlide() {
                            this.$refs.carousel.goToPage(this.$refs.carousel.getPreviousPage());
                        }
                    }
                };
                activateSingleVueInstance(el, additionalConf, 'vue-instance--active');
            });
        };
        window.activateVueInstances();

        if (window.jsToBootstrap && window.jsToBootstrap.length > 0) {
            window.jsToBootstrap.forEach(function (cb) {
                cb();
            });
        }
    };
</script>

    <script>
        /**
 * jquery.clever-infinite-scroll.js
 * Working with jQuery 2.1.4
 */
/* global define, require, history, window, document, location  */
(function (root, factory) {
    "use strict";
    if (typeof define === "function" && define.amd) {
        define(["jquery"], factory);
    } else if (typeof exports === "object") {
        factory(require("jquery"));
    } else {
        factory(root.jQuery);
    }
})(this, function ($) {
    "use strict";
    /**
     * Elements it reffers. Each page must has those selectors.
     * The structure must be same as article1.html
     * #contentsWrapper, .content, #next
     */
    $.fn.cleverInfiniteScroll = function (options) {
        /**
         * Settings
         */
        var requestNumber = 1;
        var debug = false;
        var windowHeight = null;
        var documentHeight = null;
        var defaults = {
            contentsWrapperSelector: "#contentsWrapper",
            contentSelector: ".content",
            nextSelector: "#next",
            loadImage: "",
            offset: windowHeight,
            readingListLinkCollection: $('.reading-list'),
            readingList: [],
            nextContentData: null,
            onLoadCallbacks: []
        };
        var settings = $.extend(defaults, options);
        var currentReadingListIndex = 0;
        var readingList = (settings.readingList == null) ? [] : settings.readingList;
        var nextContentToLoadIndex = 0;
        var loadingInProgress = false;
        var threshold = (settings.offset > 0) ? settings.offset : 100;
        var $articleCollection = $(settings.contentSelector);
        var $readingListLinkCollection = settings.readingListLinkCollection;
        var nextContentData = settings.nextContentData || undefined;
        var onloadCallbacks = settings.onLoadCallbacks;
        var footerHeight = 0;
        var $footer = $('#site-footer');
        if ($footer.length > 0) {
            footerHeight = $footer.outerHeight();
            $(window).on('resize', function() {
                footerHeight = $footer.outerHeight();
            });
        }

        var calculateHeights = function () {
            windowHeight = (typeof window.outerHeight !== "undefined") ? Math.max(window.outerHeight, $(window).height()) : $(window).height();
            documentHeight = $(document).height();
        };

        function _log() {
            if (debug) {
                console.log.apply(console, arguments);
            }
        }


        var setNextContentIndexToLoad = function (data) {

            var thisContentIndex = nextContentToLoadIndex;

            if (data) {
                _log("Fetched data", data);

                if (data.meta) {
                    var title = data.meta.title;
                    if (data.meta.stripped_title) {
                        title = data.meta.stripped_title;
                    }
                    readingList[thisContentIndex].title = title;
                    readingList[thisContentIndex].permalink = data.meta.url_canonical;
                    _log("Reading list substitution", readingList[thisContentIndex]);
                }

                if (data.nextContentToLoad) {
                    var readingListObject = data.nextContentToLoad;
                    readingList.push(readingListObject);
                    _log("Push della reading list", data.nextContentToLoad, readingList);
                }

                if (data.readingList) {
                    data.readingList.forEach(function (el) {
                        readingList.push(el);
                    });
                    _log("Push della reading list", data.nextContentToLoad, readingList);
                }
            }


            if (readingList) {
                nextContentToLoadIndex++;

                nextContentData = undefined;
                if (readingList[nextContentToLoadIndex]) {
                    nextContentData = readingList[nextContentToLoadIndex];
                    _log("Next content data", nextContentData);
                }

                _log("Next Content Reading List", readingList);
                return;
            }

            nextContentToLoadIndex = 0;
        };

        /**
         * Private methods
         */
        var executeCallbacks = function () {
            onloadCallbacks.forEach(function (cb) {
                cb();
            });
        };
        var generateHiddenSpans = function (_title, _path) {
            return "<span class='hidden-title' style='display:none'>" + _title + "</span><span class='hidden-url' style='display:none'>" + _path + "</span>";
        };
        var sendInfiniteScrollEvent = function (res) {
            if (typeof ga !== "undefined" && res && res.meta && res.meta.url_canonical) {
                ga('send', 'event', 'InfiniteScroll', 'pathTo', res.meta.url_canonical, {nonInteraction: true});
            }
        };
        var refreshLazyLoadedContent = function () {
            if (window.activateLazyLoadedContent) {
               window.activateLazyLoadedContent();
            }
        };
        var setTitleAndHistory = function (_title, _path) {
            var newPath = _path.replace( /^[a-zA-Z]{3,5}\:\/{2}[a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]+/, '' ); // http or https
            history.pushState(null, _title, newPath);
            $("title").html(_title);
        };
        var makePageView = function (storyIndex) {
            // value is an element of a content user is seeing
            // Get title and path of the article page from hidden span elements

            if (typeof currentReadingListIndex === "undefined") {
                currentReadingListIndex = 0;
            } else {
                currentReadingListIndex = storyIndex;
                if (currentReadingListIndex < 0) {
                    currentReadingListIndex = 0;
                }

                if (currentReadingListIndex >= readingList.length) {
                    currentReadingListIndex = (readingList.length - 1);
                }
            }

            var story = readingList[currentReadingListIndex];
            var title = story.title;
            var path = story.permalink;

            var previousReadingListIndex = getCurrentReadingListPosition();
            if (previousReadingListIndex + "" !== currentReadingListIndex + "") {
                // If it has changed
                setCurrentReadingListPosition(currentReadingListIndex);

                trackEngagement(currentReadingListIndex);
                trackNewAdvertisingPositions();
                setTitleAndHistory(title, path);

                $(document).trigger({
                    type: "infinite-scroll",
                    readingIndex: currentReadingListIndex,
                });
            }
        };

        var trackEngagement = function (readingListPosition) {
            var articleData = readingList[readingListPosition];
            var articleNotTracked = (typeof articleData.tracked === "undefined" || !articleData.tracked);
            var googleAnalyticsActive = (typeof ga !== "undefined");

            if (articleNotTracked && googleAnalyticsActive) {
                ga('send', 'event', 'LazyLoadedEngagement', 'path', articleData.permalink, {nonInteraction: true});
                articleData.tracked = true;
            }
        };

        var trackNewAdvertisingPositions = function () {
            if (typeof WebtrekkRockolClient !== "undefined") {
                WebtrekkRockolClient.trackAdvEvents();
            }
            if (typeof window.gaRockolClient !== "undefined") {
                window.gaRockolClient.trackAdvEvents();
            }
        };

        var recordNewPageView = function (callbackName) {
            var fn = window[callbackName];
            if (typeof fn === 'function') {
                fn();
            }
        };
        var getReadingListIndex = function ($selector) {
            var index = parseInt($selector.attr("data-reading-list-position"), 10) || 0;
            return index;
        };
        var getImpressionCallbackName = function ($selector) {
            var callbackName = $selector.attr("data-impression-function-name") || '';
            return callbackName;
        };
        var getCurrentReadingListPosition = function () {
            return $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector).attr("data-reading-list-position") || 0;
        };
        var setCurrentReadingListPosition = function (position) {
            return $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector).attr("data-reading-list-position", position);
        };

        var refreshTimeout = function (data) {
            if (typeof setRefreshUrl !== "undefined") {
                var ttl = 5 * 60;
                if (data.meta && data.meta.refresh_seconds) {
                    ttl = data.meta.refresh_seconds;
                }
                setRefreshUrl(ttl);
            }
        };

        var appendImpressionScriptToContainer = function (data) {
            var $scriptToAppend;
            var callbackName;
            if (data && data.impression) {
                $scriptToAppend = data.impression.script ? $(data.impression.script) : null;
                callbackName = (data.impression.callbackName) || null;
            }
            if ($scriptToAppend) {
                $scriptToAppend.appendTo($('body'));
            }

            if (callbackName) {
                recordNewPageView(data.impression.callbackName);
            }
        };

        var appendNewsToContainer = function (data) {

            if (data) {
                var $newsArticleToAppend = $(data.html_template);

                var readingListPosition = currentReadingListIndex + 1;
                console.log("READING LIST: ", readingListPosition);
                $newsArticleToAppend.attr("data-reading-list-position", (readingListPosition));

                var nextReadingPosition = readingListPosition + 1;
                if (nextReadingPosition < readingList.length) {
                    var nextStory = readingList[nextReadingPosition];
                    var $nextArticleLink = $newsArticleToAppend.find(".next-news-thumb");
                    var $nextArticleThumb = $nextArticleLink.find("img");
                    var $nextArticleLinkTitle = $newsArticleToAppend.find(".next-news-link");

                    $nextArticleLink.attr("href", nextStory.permalink);
                    $nextArticleThumb.attr("src", nextStory.picture_url);
                    $nextArticleLinkTitle.attr("href", nextStory.permalink);
                    $nextArticleLinkTitle.html(nextStory.title);
                }

                var $contentsWrapper = $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector); // get contents wrapper

                // If angular app present, compile the new content otherwise just append
                if (typeof angular !== "undefined" && typeof angular.element(document).injector() !== "undefined") {
                    angular.element(document).injector().invoke(function ($compile) {
                        var scope = $contentsWrapper.scope(); // get scope
                        // generate dynamic content

                        $contentsWrapper.append($newsArticleToAppend);
                        // compile!!!
                        $compile($contentsWrapper.contents())(scope);
                    });
                } else {
                   $contentsWrapper.append($newsArticleToAppend);
                }

                $articleCollection = $(settings.contentSelector);

                calculateHeights();
            }
        };

        function refreshAddThisShareButtons() {
            if (typeof addthis !== "undefined") {
                addthis.toolbox('.floating-share');
            }
        }

        /**
         * scroll
         */
        var lastScroll = 0, currentScroll;


        $(window).scroll(function () {
            // Detect where you are

            window.clearTimeout($.data("this", "scrollTimer"));

            var thresholdToUse = threshold;
            if (typeof ResponsiveBootstrapToolkit !== "undefined" && ResponsiveBootstrapToolkit.is('xs')) {
                thresholdToUse += $('[data-sidebar]').outerHeight() || 0;
            }

            $.data(this, "scrollTimer", window.setTimeout(function () {
                // Get current scroll position

                currentScroll = $(window).scrollTop();

                // Detect whether it's scrolling up or down by comparing current scroll location and last scroll location
                if (currentScroll > lastScroll) {
                    // If it's scrolling down
                    calculateHeights();
                    $articleCollection.each(function (key, article) {
                        if ($(article).offset().top + $(article).height() - windowHeight / 2 > currentScroll) {
                            var readingIndex = getReadingListIndex($(article));
                            makePageView(readingIndex);
                            return false;
                        }
                    });
                } else if (currentScroll < lastScroll) {
                    // If it's scrolling up
                    $articleCollection.each(function (key, article) {
                        if ($(article).offset().top + $(article).height() - windowHeight / 2 > currentScroll) {
                            var readingIndex = getReadingListIndex($(article));
                            makePageView(readingIndex);
                            return false;
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // When currentScroll == lastScroll, it does not do anything because it has not been scrolled.
                }
                // Renew last scroll position
                lastScroll = currentScroll;

            }, 200));


            /*
             console.log(
                 $(window).scrollTop() + windowHeight + footerHeight + thresholdToUse,
             documentHeight,
             "Scrolltop: " + $(window).scrollTop(),
             "Footer Height: " + footerHeight,
             "Window Height: " + windowHeight,
             "Threshold: " + threshold,
             "Threshold To Use: " + thresholdToUse
             );
             */

            _log({
                scrollTop: $(window).scrollTop(),
                windowHeight: windowHeight,
                footerHeight: footerHeight,
                thresholdToUse: thresholdToUse,
                scrollToBeActivated: ($(window).scrollTop() + windowHeight + footerHeight + thresholdToUse >= documentHeight),
                documentHeight: documentHeight
            });

            if ($(window).scrollTop() + windowHeight + footerHeight + thresholdToUse >= documentHeight) {
                // If scrolling close to the bottom
                if (loadingInProgress || nextContentData === undefined) {
                    return;
                }

                _log("Next content data", nextContentData);
                if (nextContentData !== undefined) {
                    // If the page has link, call ajax
                    if (settings.loadImage !== "") {
                        $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector).append("" +
                            "<div class='infinite-scroll-loading flex items-center justify-center text-black fill-current stroke-current py-4'>" +
                            "<!-- By Sam Herbert (@sherb), for everyone. More @ http://goo.gl/7AJzbL -->\n" +
                            "<svg width=\"38\" height=\"38\" viewBox=\"0 0 38 38\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n" +
                            "    <g fill=\"none\" fill-rule=\"evenodd\">\n" +
                            "        <g transform=\"translate(1 1)\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n" +
                            "            <circle stroke-opacity=\".5\" cx=\"18\" cy=\"18\" r=\"18\"/>\n" +
                            "            <path d=\"M36 18c0-9.94-8.06-18-18-18\">\n" +
                            "                <animateTransform\n" +
                            "                    attributeName=\"transform\"\n" +
                            "                    type=\"rotate\"\n" +
                            "                    from=\"0 18 18\"\n" +
                            "                    to=\"360 18 18\"\n" +
                            "                    dur=\"1s\"\n" +
                            "                    repeatCount=\"indefinite\"/>\n" +
                            "            </path>\n" +
                            "        </g>\n" +
                            "    </g>\n" +
                            "</svg>" +
                            "</div>");
                    }
                    loadingInProgress = true;


                    var ajaxUrl = null;
                    var data = nextContentData;
                    if (nextContentData.url_to_fetch) {
                        ajaxUrl = nextContentData.url_to_fetch;
                        data = {};
                    }

                    $.ajax({
                        url: ajaxUrl,
                        dataType: "json",
                        data: data,
                        beforeSend: function (request) {
                            request.setRequestHeader("X-Rockol-request-number", ++requestNumber);
                        },
                        success: function (res) {
                            if ($.isEmptyObject(res) === false) {
                                setNextContentIndexToLoad(res);
                                appendNewsToContainer(res);
                                appendImpressionScriptToContainer(res);

                                executeCallbacks();
                                refreshLazyLoadedContent();
                                //refreshTimeout(res);

                                if (typeof window.enableStickySidebar !== 'undefined') {
                                    window.enableStickySidebar('aside[data-sidebar]');
                                }
                            }
                            loadingInProgress = false;
                            $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector).find('.infinite-scroll-loading').remove();
                        },
                        error: function (res) {
                            loadingInProgress = false;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
        }); //scroll

        var init = function () {

            _log("Init reading list", readingList);

            var readingListPresent = readingList && (readingList.length > 0);
            var firstArticleIsInitialArticle = readingListPresent && readingList[0]['initial_article'] == true;

            _log("First Artricle Is Initial Article", firstArticleIsInitialArticle);

            _log("Reading list before first article evaluation", readingList.slice(0));
            if (firstArticleIsInitialArticle === false) {
                readingList.unshift({
                    title: document.title,
                    permalink: document.location.href,
                    tracked: true
                });
            } else {
                readingList[0].tracked = true;
            }
            _log("Reading list after first article evaluation", readingList.slice(0));

            if (nextContentData) {
                readingList.push(nextContentData);
            }

            calculateHeights();
            setNextContentIndexToLoad();

            _log("Initial Reading List", readingList.slice(0));
        };


        init();

        return (this);
    }; //$.fn.cleverInfiniteScroll
});

gold_standard.gold_text:
# Oasis e Phil Collins: gli ammessi alla Rock & Roll Hall of Fame

**Ecco chi è entrato (e chi non ce l'ha fatta) nell'"Olimpo del rock" per la classe 2026**

*Di Redazione*

Sono stati annunciati gli artisti ammessi nella Rock and Roll Hall of Fame per la classe 2026. Tra coloro che entrano da ora a far parte dell'"Olimpo del rock", nella categoria principale dedicata ai performer, ci sono Phil Collins, Billy Idol, Iron Maiden, Joy Division/New Order, Oasis, Sade, Luther Vandross, Wu-Tang Clan.

Quest'anno, la rosa di candidati contava anche della presenza di molti altri artisti. Tra questi, non sono quindi stati ammessi nella Hall of Fame: Lauryn Hill, Mariah Carey, P!NK, Black Crowes, Jeff Buckley, Melissa Etheridge, INXS, New Edition, Shakira.

Quest'anno, inoltre, Linda Creed, Arif Mardin, Jimmy Miller, Rick Rubin sono stati insigniti del Musical Excellence Award, mentre Celia Cruz, Fela Kuti, Queen Latifah, MC Lyte, Gram Parsons sono stati selezionati per ricevere il riconoscimento Early Influence. Il vincitore dell’Ahmet Ertegun Award è Ed Sullivan.

La 41esima cerimonia di induzione si terrà il prossimo 14 novembre al Peacock Theater di Los Angeles.

            const advTrackingManagement = () => {
                let advErogando = false;
                let eventSent = false;
                let debug = true;

                const event_values = {
                    TAG_NON_PRESENTE: 1,
                    DIV_EROGATO: 2,
                    DIV_NON_EROGATO: 3,
                }

                const log = (...data) => {
                    if (debug) {
                        console.info(...['EROGAZIONE ADV', ...data]);
                    }
                }

                const monitoraAdv = () => {
                    // Logica per determinare se l'adv sta erogando
                    let time = 0;
                    let time_out = 1000 * 5;
                    let interval_ms = 200;

                    let intervalId = setInterval(() => {
                        log("Controllo");

                        time += interval_ms;

                        // Se ho superato il timeout esco e invio
                        if (time > time_out) {
                            log("Timeout");
                            sendEvent(event_values.DIV_NON_EROGATO);
                            clearInterval(intervalId)
                        }

                        const div_unita_0 = document.querySelector('div[data-adunitid="0"]');
                        const div_unita_16 = document.querySelector('div[data-adunitid="16"]');

                        const divDaCercare = div_unita_0 || div_unita_16 || null;

                        // Se l'ad unit non è in pagina invio il fatto che l'adv non è attivo
                        if (divDaCercare === null) {
                            log("No Ad - Unit");
                            sendEvent(event_values.TAG_NON_PRESENTE);
                            clearInterval(intervalId);
                            return;
                        }

                        // Se l'ad unit è in pagina ed è fillato con una adv allora mando l'evento di ok
                        const divInterno = divDaCercare.querySelector('div[data-google-query-id]');
                        if (divInterno) {
                            log("Ad presente");
                            advErogando = true;
                            sendEvent(event_values.DIV_EROGATO);
                            clearInterval(intervalId)
                            return;
                        }
                    }, interval_ms);
                }


                const sendEvent = (event_value) => {
                    if (eventSent) {
                        return;
                    }

                    log('Invio evento con valore ' + event_value);

                    gtag('event', 'emp_adv', {
                        'send_to': 'G-4X2JQVYQY5',
                        'event_category': 'Adv',
                        'event_label': 'EMP Adv',
                        'value': event_value
                    });

                    eventSent = true;
                }

                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                    monitoraAdv();
                });

                window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function() {
                    sendEvent(event_values.DIV_NON_EROGATO);
                });
            };

            advTrackingManagement();
        </script>

                    <div class="body-text mb-4 news-758255" data-rockol-news-detail-body>
                        <p><strong>Gli Uriah Heep tornano in concerto in Italia</strong> dopo quattro anni. La leggendaria formazione londinese annuncia oggi le date del nuovo tour “The Magician’s Farewell”, che vedranno il gruppo guidato da Mick Box esibirsi anche nel nostro Paese per due concerti che si terranno il <strong>12 novembre al Teatro Dal Verme di Milano</strong> e il <strong>13 novembre al Teatro Celebrazioni di Bologna</strong>.<br>
In apertura di serata si esibirà un’altra band che sarà prossimamente comunicata.</p>
<div class="rckl-promo rckl-promo-rectangle-in-content rckl-promo-sticky max-w-full" data-no-infinite-scroll=""><div class="gptslot" data-adunitid="1"></div></div>
<p>I biglietti saranno in vendita secondo le seguenti modalità:<br>
- in prevendita tramite Spotify dalle ore 10:00 del 15 aprile alle ore 22:00 del 16 aprile;<br>
- vendita generale su MC2Live.it dalle ore 10:00 del 17 aprile.<br>
Saranno disponibili anche dei Vip Package.</p>
<p>Dettagli</p>
<p>URIAH HEEP - The Magician’s Farewell<br>
12 novembre 2026 - Milano, Teatro Dal Verme<br>
13 novembre 2026 - Bologna, Teatro Celebrazioni</p>
<p>Biglietti: <a href="https://mc2live.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=56d248bfb3ba96ca443ae6026&id=44da0c45a5&e=31eae866f9">MC2 Live</a></p>
<div class="embed"><img src="https://images.rockol.it/VNxifK90JSmIX2XqpmuAGie461E=/700x0/smart/rockol-img/img/foto/upload/uriah-heep-1.jpg" alt="https://images.rockol.it/VNxifK90JSmIX2XqpmuAGie461E=/700x0/smart/rockol-img/img/foto/upload/uriah-heep-1.jpg" title="https://images.rockol.it/VNxifK90JSmIX2XqpmuAGie461E=/700x0/smart/rockol-img/img/foto/upload/uriah-heep-1.jpg" class="img-responsive"></div>                    </div>

    <div class="user-menu-social" v-show="!loginInProgress">

      |----------------------------
      -->
      <div class="block custom-login-panel" v-if="!showRegistrationForm">

        <!-- LOGIN con user e password -->
        <div class="mb-4" v-if="!showResetPasswordForm">
          <span class="heading block text-3xl mb-4">Hai già un profilo Rockol? Accedi!</span>

          <custom-login
            :disabled="loginInProgress"
            class="mb-4"></custom-login>

          <div class="text-center text-xxs">
            <a href="#" @click.prevent="showResetPasswordForm = true"
               class="underline">Hai dimenticato la password?</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- RESET PASSWORD -->
        <div class="mb-4" v-if="showResetPasswordForm">
          <span class="heading block text-3xl mb-4">Hai dimenticato la password?</span>

          <p class="text-sm mb-4">
            Inserisci l'indirizzo e-mail fornito in fase di registrazione e richiedi il reset della
            password.
          </p>

          <reset-password-form class="mb-4"></reset-password-form>

          <div class="text-center text-xxs">
            <a href="#" @click.prevent="showResetPasswordForm = false"
               class="underline">Procedi al login</a>
          </div>
        </div>


        <div class="mod-md-title text-center">
          <button
            data-cy="registerNewUserFromMainLoginPanel"
            type="button"
            class="text-lg font-bold "
            @click="showRegistrationForm = true">
            Non sei registrato? <span class="text-red-600 underline hover:text-red-700">Registrati ora a MyRockol!</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Form di registrazione -->
      <div class="mb-4" v-if="showRegistrationForm">
        <span class="heading block text-3xl mb-4">Registrati!</span>
        <quick-registration-form :cancel-callback="hideRegistrationForm"></quick-registration-form>
      </div>


      <!-- Separator -->

      <strong class="heading block text-xl mb-4">Accedi con</strong>

<script>
    bootstrapApp = function () {
        if (typeof setupDropDowns !== 'undefined') {
            console.log('Dropdowns initialization');
            window.setupDropDowns();
        }

        /*
        |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
        | Vue instances initialization
        |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
        */
        window.activateSingleVueInstance = function (el, componentAdditionalConf, classesToAdd) {
            var vm = new Vue(factoryVueConfiguration(el, componentAdditionalConf));
            el.classList.add(classesToAdd);
        }

        window.activateVueInstances = function () {
            document.querySelectorAll('.vue-instance:not(.vue-instance--active)').forEach(function (el) {
                activateSingleVueInstance(el, {}, 'vue-instance--active');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.vue-instance-carousel:not(.vue-instance--active)').forEach(function (el) {
                var additionalConf = {
                    components: {
                        'Carousel': VueCarousel.Carousel,
                        'Slide': VueCarousel.Slide
                    },
                    methods: {
                        nextSlide() {
                            this.$refs.carousel.goToPage(this.$refs.carousel.getNextPage());
                        },
                        prevSlide() {
                            this.$refs.carousel.goToPage(this.$refs.carousel.getPreviousPage());
                        }
                    }
                };
                activateSingleVueInstance(el, additionalConf, 'vue-instance--active');
            });
        };
        window.activateVueInstances();

        if (window.jsToBootstrap && window.jsToBootstrap.length > 0) {
            window.jsToBootstrap.forEach(function (cb) {
                cb();
            });
        }
    };
</script>

        /**

/* global define, require, history, window, document, location  */
(function (root, factory) {
    "use strict";
    if (typeof define === "function" && define.amd) {
        define(["jquery"], factory);
    } else if (typeof exports === "object") {
        factory(require("jquery"));
    } else {
        factory(root.jQuery);
    }
})(this, function ($) {
    "use strict";
    /**
     * Elements it reffers. Each page must has those selectors.
     * The structure must be same as article1.html
     * #contentsWrapper, .content, #next
     */
    $.fn.cleverInfiniteScroll = function (options) {
        /**
         * Settings
         */
        var requestNumber = 1;
        var debug = false;
        var windowHeight = null;
        var documentHeight = null;
        var defaults = {
            contentsWrapperSelector: "#contentsWrapper",
            contentSelector: ".content",
            nextSelector: "#next",
            loadImage: "",
            offset: windowHeight,
            readingListLinkCollection: $('.reading-list'),
            readingList: [],
            nextContentData: null,
            onLoadCallbacks: []
        };
        var settings = $.extend(defaults, options);
        var currentReadingListIndex = 0;
        var readingList = (settings.readingList == null) ? [] : settings.readingList;
        var nextContentToLoadIndex = 0;
        var loadingInProgress = false;
        var threshold = (settings.offset > 0) ? settings.offset : 100;
        var $articleCollection = $(settings.contentSelector);
        var $readingListLinkCollection = settings.readingListLinkCollection;
        var nextContentData = settings.nextContentData || undefined;
        var onloadCallbacks = settings.onLoadCallbacks;
        var footerHeight = 0;
        var $footer = $('#site-footer');
        if ($footer.length > 0) {
            footerHeight = $footer.outerHeight();
            $(window).on('resize', function() {
                footerHeight = $footer.outerHeight();
            });
        }

        var calculateHeights = function () {
            windowHeight = (typeof window.outerHeight !== "undefined") ? Math.max(window.outerHeight, $(window).height()) : $(window).height();
            documentHeight = $(document).height();
        };

        function _log() {
            if (debug) {
                console.log.apply(console, arguments);
            }
        }


        var setNextContentIndexToLoad = function (data) {

            var thisContentIndex = nextContentToLoadIndex;

            if (data) {
                _log("Fetched data", data);

                if (data.meta) {
                    var title = data.meta.title;
                    if (data.meta.stripped_title) {
                        title = data.meta.stripped_title;
                    }
                    readingList[thisContentIndex].title = title;
                    readingList[thisContentIndex].permalink = data.meta.url_canonical;
                    _log("Reading list substitution", readingList[thisContentIndex]);
                }

                if (data.nextContentToLoad) {
                    var readingListObject = data.nextContentToLoad;
                    readingList.push(readingListObject);
                    _log("Push della reading list", data.nextContentToLoad, readingList);
                }

                if (data.readingList) {
                    data.readingList.forEach(function (el) {
                        readingList.push(el);
                    });
                    _log("Push della reading list", data.nextContentToLoad, readingList);
                }
            }


            if (readingList) {
                nextContentToLoadIndex++;

                nextContentData = undefined;
                if (readingList[nextContentToLoadIndex]) {
                    nextContentData = readingList[nextContentToLoadIndex];
                    _log("Next content data", nextContentData);
                }

                _log("Next Content Reading List", readingList);
                return;
            }

            nextContentToLoadIndex = 0;
        };

        /**
         * Private methods
         */
        var executeCallbacks = function () {
            onloadCallbacks.forEach(function (cb) {
                cb();
            });
        };
        var generateHiddenSpans = function (_title, _path) {
            return "<span class='hidden-title' style='display:none'>" + _title + "</span><span class='hidden-url' style='display:none'>" + _path + "</span>";
        };
        var sendInfiniteScrollEvent = function (res) {
            if (typeof ga !== "undefined" && res && res.meta && res.meta.url_canonical) {
                ga('send', 'event', 'InfiniteScroll', 'pathTo', res.meta.url_canonical, {nonInteraction: true});
            }
        };
        var refreshLazyLoadedContent = function () {
            if (window.activateLazyLoadedContent) {
               window.activateLazyLoadedContent();
            }
        };
        var setTitleAndHistory = function (_title, _path) {
            var newPath = _path.replace( /^[a-zA-Z]{3,5}\:\/{2}[a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]+/, '' ); // http or https
            history.pushState(null, _title, newPath);
            $("title").html(_title);
        };
        var makePageView = function (storyIndex) {
            // value is an element of a content user is seeing
            // Get title and path of the article page from hidden span elements

            if (typeof currentReadingListIndex === "undefined") {
                currentReadingListIndex = 0;
            } else {
                currentReadingListIndex = storyIndex;
                if (currentReadingListIndex < 0) {
                    currentReadingListIndex = 0;
                }

                if (currentReadingListIndex >= readingList.length) {
                    currentReadingListIndex = (readingList.length - 1);
                }
            }

            var story = readingList[currentReadingListIndex];
            var title = story.title;
            var path = story.permalink;

            var previousReadingListIndex = getCurrentReadingListPosition();
            if (previousReadingListIndex + "" !== currentReadingListIndex + "") {
                // If it has changed
                setCurrentReadingListPosition(currentReadingListIndex);

                trackEngagement(currentReadingListIndex);
                trackNewAdvertisingPositions();
                setTitleAndHistory(title, path);

                $(document).trigger({
                    type: "infinite-scroll",
                    readingIndex: currentReadingListIndex,
                });
            }
        };

            var articleData = readingList[readingListPosition];
            var articleNotTracked = (typeof articleData.tracked === "undefined" || !articleData.tracked);
            var googleAnalyticsActive = (typeof ga !== "undefined");

            if (articleNotTracked && googleAnalyticsActive) {
                ga('send', 'event', 'LazyLoadedEngagement', 'path', articleData.permalink, {nonInteraction: true});
                articleData.tracked = true;
            }
        };

        var trackNewAdvertisingPositions = function () {
            if (typeof WebtrekkRockolClient !== "undefined") {
                WebtrekkRockolClient.trackAdvEvents();
            }
            if (typeof window.gaRockolClient !== "undefined") {
                window.gaRockolClient.trackAdvEvents();
            }
        };

        var recordNewPageView = function (callbackName) {
            var fn = window[callbackName];
            if (typeof fn === 'function') {
                fn();
            }
        };
        var getReadingListIndex = function ($selector) {
            var index = parseInt($selector.attr("data-reading-list-position"), 10) || 0;
            return index;
        };
        var getImpressionCallbackName = function ($selector) {
            var callbackName = $selector.attr("data-impression-function-name") || '';
            return callbackName;
        };
        var getCurrentReadingListPosition = function () {
            return $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector).attr("data-reading-list-position") || 0;
        };
        var setCurrentReadingListPosition = function (position) {
            return $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector).attr("data-reading-list-position", position);
        };

        var refreshTimeout = function (data) {
            if (typeof setRefreshUrl !== "undefined") {
                var ttl = 5 * 60;
                if (data.meta && data.meta.refresh_seconds) {
                    ttl = data.meta.refresh_seconds;
                }
                setRefreshUrl(ttl);

        };

        var appendImpressionScriptToContainer = function (data) {
            var $scriptToAppend;
            var callbackName;
            if (data && data.impression) {
                $scriptToAppend = data.impression.script ? $(data.impression.script) : null;
                callbackName = (data.impression.callbackName) || null;
            }
            if ($scriptToAppend) {
                $scriptToAppend.appendTo($('body'));
            }

            if (callbackName) {
                recordNewPageView(data.impression.callbackName);
            }
        };

        var appendNewsToContainer = function (data) {

            if (data) {
                var $newsArticleToAppend = $(data.html_template);

                var readingListPosition = currentReadingListIndex + 1;
                console.log("READING LIST: ", readingListPosition);
                $newsArticleToAppend.attr("data-reading-list-position", (readingListPosition));

                var nextReadingPosition = readingListPosition + 1;
                if (nextReadingPosition < readingList.length) {
                    var nextStory = readingList[nextReadingPosition];
                    var $nextArticleLink = $newsArticleToAppend.find(".next-news-thumb");
                    var $nextArticleThumb = $nextArticleLink.find("img");
                    var $nextArticleLinkTitle = $newsArticleToAppend.find(".next-news-link");

                    $nextArticleLink.attr("href", nextStory.permalink);
                    $nextArticleThumb.attr("src", nextStory.picture_url);
                    $nextArticleLinkTitle.attr("href", nextStory.permalink);
                    $nextArticleLinkTitle.html(nextStory.title);
                }

                var $contentsWrapper = $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector); // get contents wrapper

                // If angular app present, compile the new content otherwise just append
                if (typeof angular !== "undefined" && typeof angular.element(document).injector() !== "undefined") {
                    angular.element(document).injector().invoke(function ($compile) {
                        var scope = $contentsWrapper.scope(); // get scope

                } else {
                   $contentsWrapper.append($newsArticleToAppend);
                }

                $articleCollection = $(settings.contentSelector);

                calculateHeights();
            }
        };

        function refreshAddThisShareButtons() {
            if (typeof addthis !== "undefined") {
                addthis.toolbox('.floating-share');
            }
        }

         * scroll
         */
        var lastScroll = 0, currentScroll;

                // Get current scroll position

                currentScroll = $(window).scrollTop();

                // Detect whether it's scrolling up or down by comparing current scroll location and last scroll location
                if (currentScroll > lastScroll) {
                    // If it's scrolling down
                    calculateHeights();
                    $articleCollection.each(function (key, article) {
                        if ($(article).offset().top + $(article).height() - windowHeight / 2 > currentScroll) {
                            var readingIndex = getReadingListIndex($(article));
                            makePageView(readingIndex);
                            return false;
                        }
                    });
                } else if (currentScroll < lastScroll) {
                    // If it's scrolling up
                    $articleCollection.each(function (key, article) {
                        if ($(article).offset().top + $(article).height() - windowHeight / 2 > currentScroll) {
                            var readingIndex = getReadingListIndex($(article));
                            makePageView(readingIndex);
                            return false;
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // When currentScroll == lastScroll, it does not do anything because it has not been scrolled.
                }
                // Renew last scroll position
                lastScroll = currentScroll;

            }, 200));


            /*
             console.log(
                 $(window).scrollTop() + windowHeight + footerHeight + thresholdToUse,
             documentHeight,
             "Scrolltop: " + $(window).scrollTop(),
             "Footer Height: " + footerHeight,
             "Window Height: " + windowHeight,
             "Threshold: " + threshold,
             "Threshold To Use: " + thresholdToUse
             );
             */

            _log({
                scrollTop: $(window).scrollTop(),
                windowHeight: windowHeight,
                footerHeight: footerHeight,
                thresholdToUse: thresholdToUse,
                scrollToBeActivated: ($(window).scrollTop() + windowHeight + footerHeight + thresholdToUse >= documentHeight),
                documentHeight: documentHeight
            });

            if ($(window).scrollTop() + windowHeight + footerHeight + thresholdToUse >= documentHeight) {
                // If scrolling close to the bottom
                if (loadingInProgress || nextContentData === undefined) {
                    return;
                }

                _log("Next content data", nextContentData);
                if (nextContentData !== undefined) {
                    // If the page has link, call ajax
                    if (settings.loadImage !== "") {
                        $(settings.contentsWrapperSelector).append("" +
                            "<div class='infinite-scroll-loading flex items-center justify-center text-black fill-current stroke-current py-4'>" +
                            "<!-- By Sam Herbert (@sherb), for everyone. More @ http://goo.gl/7AJzbL -->\n" +
                            "<svg width=\"38\" height=\"38\" viewBox=\"0 0 38 38\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n" +
                            "    <g fill=\"none\" fill-rule=\"evenodd\">\n" +
                            "        <g transform=\"translate(1 1)\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n" +
                            "            <circle stroke-opacity=\".5\" cx=\"18\" cy=\"18\" r=\"18\"/>\n" +
                            "            <path d=\"M36 18c0-9.94-8.06-18-18-18\">\n" +
                            "                <animateTransform\n" +
                            "                    attributeName=\"transform\"\n" +
                            "                    type=\"rotate\"\n" +
                            "                    from=\"0 18 18\"\n" +
                            "                    to=\"360 18 18\"\n" +
                            "                    dur=\"1s\"\n" +
                            "                    repeatCount=\"indefinite\"/>\n" +
                            "            </path>\n" +
                            "        </g>\n" +
                            "    </g>\n" +
                            "</svg>" +
                            "</div>");
                    }
                    loadingInProgress = true;


                    var ajaxUrl = null;
                    var data = nextContentData;
                    if (nextContentData.url_to_fetch) {
                        ajaxUrl = nextContentData.url_to_fetch;
                        data = {};
                    }

                    $.ajax({
                        url: ajaxUrl,
                        dataType: "json",
                        data: data,
                        beforeSend: function (request) {
                            request.setRequestHeader("X-Rockol-request-number", ++requestNumber);
                        },
                        success: function (res) {

                                    window.enableStickySidebar('aside[data-sidebar]');

                        },
                        error: function (res) {
                            loadingInProgress = false;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
        }); //scroll

        var init = function () {

            _log("Init reading list", readingList);

            var readingListPresent = readingList && (readingList.length > 0);
            var firstArticleIsInitialArticle = readingListPresent && readingList[0]['initial_article'] == true;

            _log("First Artricle Is Initial Article", firstArticleIsInitialArticle);

            _log("Reading list before first article evaluation", readingList.slice(0));
            if (firstArticleIsInitialArticle === false) {
                readingList.unshift({
                    title: document.title,
                    permalink: document.location.href,
                    tracked: true
                });
            } else {
                readingList[0].tracked = true;
            }
            _log("Reading list after first article evaluation", readingList.slice(0));

            if (nextContentData) {
                readingList.push(nextContentData);
            }

            calculateHeights();
            setNextContentIndexToLoad();

            _log("Initial Reading List", readingList.slice(0));
        };


        init();

        return (this);
    }; //$.fn.cleverInfiniteScroll

gold_standard.gold_text:
# Il ritorno in Italia degli Uriah Heep: due date a novembre

**La leggendaria formazione londinese annuncia oggi le date del nuovo tour “The Magician's Farewell”**

*Di Redazione*

Gli Uriah Heep tornano in concerto in Italia dopo quattro anni.

In apertura di serata si esibirà un'altra band che sarà prossimamente comunicata. I biglietti saranno in vendita secondo le seguenti modalità:

* in prevendita tramite Spotify dalle ore 10:00 del 15 aprile alle ore 22:00 del 16 aprile;
* vendita generale su MC2Live.it dalle ore 10:00 del 17 aprile.

Saranno disponibili anche dei Vip Package.

## Dettagli

URIAH HEEP - The Magician's Farewell
12 novembre 2026 - Milano, Teatro Dal Verme
13 novembre 2026 - Bologna, Teatro Celebrazioni

Biglietti: MC2 Live

            const advTrackingManagement = () => {
                let advErogando = false;
                let eventSent = false;
                let debug = true;

                const event_values = {
                    TAG_NON_PRESENTE: 1,
                    DIV_EROGATO: 2,
                    DIV_NON_EROGATO: 3,
                }

                const log = (...data) => {
                    if (debug) {
                        console.info(...['EROGAZIONE ADV', ...data]);
                    }
                }

                const monitoraAdv = () => {
                    // Logica per determinare se l'adv sta erogando
                    let time = 0;
                    let time_out = 1000 * 5;
                    let interval_ms = 200;

                    let intervalId = setInterval(() => {
                        log("Controllo");

                        time += interval_ms;

                        // Se ho superato il timeout esco e invio
                        if (time > time_out) {
                            log("Timeout");
                            sendEvent(event_values.DIV_NON_EROGATO);
                            clearInterval(intervalId)
                        }

                        const div_unita_0 = document.querySelector('div[data-adunitid="0"]');
                        const div_unita_16 = document.querySelector('div[data-adunitid="16"]');

                        const divDaCercare = div_unita_0 || div_unita_16 || null;

                        // Se l'ad unit non è in pagina invio il fatto che l'adv non è attivo
                        if (divDaCercare === null) {
                            log("No Ad - Unit");
                            sendEvent(event_values.TAG_NON_PRESENTE);
                            clearInterval(intervalId);
                            return;
                        }

                        // Se l'ad unit è in pagina ed è fillato con una adv allora mando l'evento di ok
                        const divInterno = divDaCercare.querySelector('div[data-google-query-id]');
                        if (divInterno) {
                            log("Ad presente");
                            advErogando = true;
                            sendEvent(event_values.DIV_EROGATO);
                            clearInterval(intervalId)
                            return;
                        }
                    }, interval_ms);
                }


                const sendEvent = (event_value) => {
                    if (eventSent) {
                        return;
                    }

                    log('Invio evento con valore ' + event_value);

                    gtag('event', 'emp_adv', {
                        'send_to': 'G-4X2JQVYQY5',
                        'event_category': 'Adv',
                        'event_label': 'EMP Adv',
                        'value': event_value
                    });

                    eventSent = true;
                }

                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                    monitoraAdv();
                });

                window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function() {
                    sendEvent(event_values.DIV_NON_EROGATO);
                });
            };

            advTrackingManagement();
        </script>

    <div class="content-with-sidebar spacer-lg">

                </figure>
            

                            <div class="mb-4">            
            <div
                class="block mx-auto text-center"
                                data-track="adv.78e6b0a5-1f64-4b1d-899d-fd3ce69ef63a.leader-mini-news-71366"
                data-track-click="1"
                data-track-impression="1">
                <a href="https://musicbiz.rockol.it/news-757708/il-libro-bianco-dell-industria-musicale-italiana-2025"  target='_blank' rel='sponsored noopener noreferrer' >
                    <img alt="" src="https://images.rockol.it/lnXMhRqDacljwHyBBphg8VlZB9s=/0x0/rockol-img/rockolad-assets/lb_970x250.0092.png" style="display: inline-block;">
                </a>
            </div></div>
            
            <div>

                <div class="w-full ">

                    

    
        <div class="pb-2">
        Di <em class="italic font-black"><strong><a href="https://www.rockol.it/autore/gianni-sibilla" class="underline">Gianni Sibilla</a></strong></em>
    </div>
    


                    <div class="body-text mb-4 news-758264" data-rockol-news-detail-body>
                        <p>Quella dei bootleg e delle registrazioni amatoriali dei concerti è una delle storie laterali più interessanti e affascinanti per gli appassionati di musica. Dagli anni ’60 è una sorta di universo alternativo per i fan, che possono ascoltare performance e concerti dei loro artisti. Un mondo osteggiato dall’industria e spesso dagli artisti, perché basato sul commercio di musica fuori dai canali tradizionali e legali - ma talvolta incentivato per compattare e rafforzare la propria fan base, come dimostra il caso dei Grateful Dead, che permisero  già dagli anni ’60 il taping ai concerti, poi seguiti e imitati da molti altri artisti<br>
Se prima i bootleg circolavano attraverso la rete dei fan che si scambiavano cassettine e il commercio (illegale) di registrazioni pirata che arrivavano anche nei negozi specializzati, con l’arrivo del digitale è cambiato tutto: si sono create comunità, forum e archivi in cui i fan si scambiano registrazioni in rete senza fini di lucro. Diversi artisti hanno in parte ufficializzato questa pratica, con bootleg diffusi attraverso piattaforme dedicate come Nugs.net</p>
<div class="rckl-promo rckl-promo-rectangle-in-content rckl-promo-sticky max-w-full" data-no-infinite-scroll=""><div class="gptslot" data-adunitid="1"></div></div>
<p>È un campo in cui circolano figure quasi leggendarie, dalle storie rocambolesche. Una è quella di <a href="https://www.rockol.it/news-754083/chi-era-mike-millard-e-perche-c-entra-con-i-pink-floyd">Mike Millard, taper losangelino</a> che si fingeva invalido per introdurre le attrezzature ai concerti e le cui registrazioni sono diventate materiale di riferimento per documentare esibizioni storiche, come quella dei Pink Floyd che ha fatto parte della ristampa per i 50 anni di “Wish you were here”.<br>
Negli ultimi giorni è emersa una storia altrettanto significativa. Come racconta un articolo della Associated Press, un fan di Chicago, Aadam Jacobs, ha registrato oltre 10.000 concerti nell’arco di circa quarant’anni, principalmente nella sua città ma anche altrove. Il suo archivio è in corso di digitalizzazione e pubblicazione su Internet Archive - uno dei luoghi principali di condivisione di registrazioni live - diventando progressivamente accessibile per l'ascolto.</p>
<p>Jacobs iniziò a registrare già nel 1984, dopo aver scoperto che era possibile portare (di nascosto) un registratore ai concerti e documentarli. All’inizio utilizzava strumenti rudimentali, spesso presi in prestito o adattati, per poi passare negli anni a tecnologie più avanzate, dal DAT ai registratori digitali. Come racconta AP, non si è mai definito un archivista, ma semplicemente un fan: frequentava diversi concerti a settimana e ha deciso di documentarli. Con il tempo è diventato una presenza stabile nella scena musicale di Chicago, al punto che molti locali hanno iniziato a riconoscerlo e a lasciarlo entrare gratuitamente. Nel 2023 è stato fatto persino <a href="https://vimeo.com/866218283" target="_blank">un documentario su di lui.</a></p>
<div class="rckl-promo rckl-promo-rectangle-in-content rckl-promo-sticky max-w-full" data-no-infinite-scroll=""><div class="gptslot" data-adunitid="2"></div></div>
<p>La collezione include esibizioni di artisti come i Nirvana prima dell’esplosione di “Nevermind”, R.E.M. già negli anni ’80 (anche loro prima del successo mainstream), Cure, Pixies, Depeche Mode, Sonic Youth e Björk, oltre a centinaia di concerti di artisti meno noti. Da qualche anno ha smesso di andare ai concerti per problemi di salute, ma li ascolta in rete: “Tutti possono registrare i concerti con un telefonino, ora”, ha raccontato all’AP</p>
<p>Il lavoro di digitalizzazione è portato avanti da una rete di volontari tra Stati Uniti ed Europa. Le cassette e i DAT vengono trasferiti in formato digitale, restaurati e catalogati: finora sono stati convertiti migliaia di concerti, ma il processo richiederà ancora anni per essere completato, con diversi problemi tecnici e pratici: la ricostruzione delle scalette, dei titoli delle canzoni, dei dettagli dei concerti, o il restauro dei nastri. E anche con sfide legali: formalmente le registrazioni appartengono agli artisti, ma il fatto che non ci sia profitto rende improbabili azioni legali. Finora solo pochi musicisti hanno chiesto la rimozione dei propri materiali. Al contrario, in alcuni casi le registrazioni di Jacobs sono state utilizzate ufficialmente: i Replacements hanno integrato una sua registrazione del 1986 in una pubblicazione live uscita nel 2023 - come è successo con Millard e i Pink Floyd</p>
<div class="rckl-promo rckl-promo-rectangle-in-content rckl-promo-sticky max-w-full" data-no-infinite-scroll=""><div class="gptslot" data-adunitid="3"></div></div>
<p>L’archivio di Jacobs è però un caso unico per ampiezza, continuità e valore documentario: una storia parallela della musica live, costruita da un singolo spettatore.</p>                    </div>

                    
                    
                    
                    

                    

                </div>

            </div>

      -->
      <div class="block custom-login-panel" v-if="!showRegistrationForm">

        <div class="mb-4" v-if="!showResetPasswordForm">

          <custom-login
            :disabled="loginInProgress"

            <a href="#" @click.prevent="showResetPasswordForm = true"
               class="underline">Hai dimenticato la password?</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="mb-4" v-if="showResetPasswordForm">
          <span class="heading block text-3xl mb-4">Hai dimenticato la password?</span>

            password.
          </p>

          <div class="text-center text-xxs">
            <a href="#" @click.prevent="showResetPasswordForm = false"
               class="underline">Procedi al login</a>
          </div>
        </div>


        <div class="mod-md-title text-center">
          <button
            data-cy="registerNewUserFromMainLoginPanel"
            type="button"
            class="text-lg font-bold "
            @click="showRegistrationForm = true">
            Non sei registrato? <span class="text-red-600 underline hover:text-red-700">Registrati ora a MyRockol!</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Form di registrazione -->
      <div class="mb-4" v-if="showRegistrationForm">
        <span class="heading block text-3xl mb-4">Registrati!</span>

      <strong class="heading block text-xl mb-4">Accedi con</strong>

      -->

</svg></social-login>
      </div>

        <input type="checkbox" value="1"

               name="user-auth-privacy"
               id="user-auth-privacy-social">

<script>
    bootstrapApp = function () {
        if (typeof setupDropDowns !== 'undefined') {
            console.log('Dropdowns initialization');
            window.setupDropDowns();
        }

        /*
        |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
        | Vue instances initialization
        |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
        */
        window.activateSingleVueInstance = function (el, componentAdditionalConf, classesToAdd) {
            var vm = new Vue(factoryVueConfiguration(el, componentAdditionalConf));
            el.classList.add(classesToAdd);
        }

        window.activateVueInstances = function () {
            document.querySelectorAll('.vue-instance:not(.vue-instance--active)').forEach(function (el) {
                activateSingleVueInstance(el, {}, 'vue-instance--active');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.vue-instance-carousel:not(.vue-instance--active)').forEach(function (el) {
                var additionalConf = {
                    components: {
                        'Carousel': VueCarousel.Carousel,
                        'Slide': VueCarousel.Slide
                    },
                    methods: {
                        nextSlide() {
                            this.$refs.carousel.goToPage(this.$refs.carousel.getNextPage());
                        },
                        prevSlide() {
                            this.$refs.carousel.goToPage(this.$refs.carousel.getPreviousPage());
                        }
                    }
                };
                activateSingleVueInstance(el, additionalConf, 'vue-instance--active');
            });
        };
        window.activateVueInstances();

        if (window.jsToBootstrap && window.jsToBootstrap.length > 0) {
            window.jsToBootstrap.forEach(function (cb) {
                cb();
            });
        }
    };
</script>

    <script>
        /**
 * jquery.clever-infinite-scroll.js
 * Working with jQuery 2.1.4
 */
/* global define, require, history, window, document, location  */
(function (root, factory) {
    "use strict";
    if (typeof define === "function" && define.amd) {
        define(["jquery"], factory);
    } else if (typeof exports === "object") {
        factory(require("jquery"));
    } else {
        factory(root.jQuery);
    }
})(this, function ($) {
    "use strict";
    /**
     * Elements it reffers. Each page must has those selectors.
     * The structure must be same as article1.html
     * #contentsWrapper, .content, #next
     */
    $.fn.cleverInfiniteScroll = function (options) {
        /**
         * Settings
         */
        var requestNumber = 1;
        var debug = false;
        var windowHeight = null;
        var documentHeight = null;
        var defaults = {
            contentsWrapperSelector: "#contentsWrapper",
            contentSelector: ".content",
            nextSelector: "#next",
            loadImage: "",
            offset: windowHeight,
            readingListLinkCollection: $('.reading-list'),
            readingList: [],
            nextContentData: null,
            onLoadCallbacks: []
        };
        var settings = $.extend(defaults, options);
        var currentReadingListIndex = 0;
        var readingList = (settings.readingList == null) ? [] : settings.readingList;
        var nextContentToLoadIndex = 0;
        var loadingInProgress = false;
        var threshold = (settings.offset > 0) ? settings.offset : 100;
        var $articleCollection = $(settings.contentSelector);
        var $readingListLinkCollection = settings.readingListLinkCollection;
        var nextContentData = settings.nextContentData || undefined;
        var onloadCallbacks = settings.onLoadCallbacks;
        var footerHeight = 0;
        var $footer = $('#site-footer');
        if ($footer.length > 0) {
            footerHeight = $footer.outerHeight();
            $(window).on('resize', function() {
                footerHeight = $footer.outerHeight();
            });
        }

        var calculateHeights = function () {
            windowHeight = (typeof window.outerHeight !== "undefined") ? Math.max(window.outerHeight, $(window).height()) : $(window).height();
            documentHeight = $(document).height();
        };

        function _log() {
            if (debug) {
                console.log.apply(console, arguments);
            }
        }


        var setNextContentIndexToLoad = function (data) {

            var thisContentIndex = nextContentToLoadIndex;

            if (data) {
                _log("Fetched data", data);

                if (data.meta) {
                    var title = data.meta.title;
                    if (data.meta.stripped_title) {
                        title = data.meta.stripped_title;
                    }
                    readingList[thisContentIndex].title = title;
                    readingList[thisContentIndex].permalink = data.meta.url_canonical;
                    _log("Reading list substitution", readingList[thisContentIndex]);
                }

                if (data.nextContentToLoad) {
                    var readingListObject = data.nextContentToLoad;
                    readingList.push(readingListObject);
                    _log("Push della reading list", data.nextContentToLoad, readingList);
                }

                if (data.readingList) {
                    data.readingList.forEach(function (el) {
                        readingList.push(el);
                    });
                    _log("Push della reading list", data.nextContentToLoad, readingList);
                }
            }


            if (readingList) {
                nextContentToLoadIndex++;

                nextContentData = undefined;
                if (readingList[nextContentToLoadIndex]) {
                    nextContentData = readingList[nextContentToLoadIndex];
                    _log("Next content data", nextContentData);
                }

                _log("Next Content Reading List", readingList);
                return;
            }

            nextContentToLoadIndex = 0;
        };

        /**
         * Private methods
         */
        var executeCallbacks = function () {
            onloadCallbacks.forEach(function (cb) {
                cb();
            });
        };
        var generateHiddenSpans = function (_title, _path) {
            return "<span class='hidden-title' style='display:none'>" + _title + "</span><span class='hidden-url' style='display:none'>" + _path + "</span>";
        };
        var sendInfiniteScrollEvent = function (res) {
            if (typeof ga !== "undefined" && res && res.meta && res.meta.url_canonical) {
                ga('send', 'event', 'InfiniteScroll', 'pathTo', res.meta.url_canonical, {nonInteraction: true});
            }
        };
        var refreshLazyLoadedContent = function () {
            if (window.activateLazyLoadedContent) {
               window.activateLazyLoadedContent();
            }
        };
        var setTitleAndHistory = function (_title, _path) {
            var newPath = _path.replace( /^[a-zA-Z]{3,5}\:\/{2}[a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]+/, '' ); // http or https
            history.pushState(null, _title, newPath);
            $("title").html(_title);
        };
        var makePageView = function (storyIndex) {
            // value is an element of a content user is seeing
            // Get title and path of the article page from hidden span elements

            if (typeof currentReadingListIndex === "undefined") {
                currentReadingListIndex = 0;
            } else {
                currentReadingListIndex = storyIndex;
                if (currentReadingListIndex < 0) {
                    currentReadingListIndex = 0;
                }

                if (currentReadingListIndex >= readingList.length) {
                    currentReadingListIndex = (readingList.length - 1);
                }
            }

            var story = readingList[currentReadingListIndex];
            var title = story.title;
            var path = story.permalink;

            var previousReadingListIndex = getCurrentReadingListPosition();
            if (previousReadingListIndex + "" !== currentReadingListIndex + "") {
                // If it has changed
                setCurrentReadingListPosition(currentReadingListIndex);

                trackEngagement(currentReadingListIndex);
                trackNewAdvertisingPositions();
                setTitleAndHistory(title, path);

                $(document).trigger({
                    type: "infinite-scroll",
                    readingIndex: currentReadingListIndex,
                });
            }
        };

        var trackEngagement = function (readingListPosition) {
            var articleData = readingList[readingListPosition];
            var articleNotTracked = (typeof articleData.tracked === "undefined" || !articleData.tracked);

                articleData.tracked = true;
            }
        };
